coffee-pub-herald.headingH2Broadcast-Hint: Settings for streaming and recording your FoundryVTT sessions. Designate a broadcast user who will see a clean, UI-free view for streaming.
coffee-pub-herald.enableBroadcast-Hint: Enable the broadcast feature. When enabled, the designated broadcast user will receive a special UI-free view suitable for streaming or recording.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastUserId-Hint: The user who will serve as the cameraman. Select from the dropdown (all users in the world).
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastAnimationDuration-Hint: Duration of camera pan/zoom animations in milliseconds. Higher values = slower, smoother animations. Lower values = faster, snappier animations.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastFollowDistanceThreshold-Hint: Minimum grid spaces required to trigger camera pan.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastFollowThrottleMs-Hint: Minimum milliseconds between camera pan operations. Prevents excessive panning on rapid token movements.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastAutoCloseWindows-Hint: Auto-close broadcast-opened windows on the cameraman client.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastHideBackground-Hint: Hide the scene background image when in broadcast mode. Useful for cleaner streaming visuals.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastHideInterfaceLeft-Hint: Hide the left UI section (navigation, players list) when in broadcast mode.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastHideInterfaceMiddle-Hint: Hide the middle UI section when in broadcast mode.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastHideInterfaceRight-Hint: Hide the right UI section when in broadcast mode.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastHideNotifications-Hint: Hide Foundry pop-up notifications when in broadcast mode.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastShowCombatBar-Hint: When enabled, the cameraman view will show the Blacksmith combat secondary bar (data-bar-type="combat") when in broadcast mode. Disable for a fully clean view.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastBarHeight-Hint: Height of the broadcast secondary bar in pixels. Blacksmith uses this via the menubar API; the CSS variable --blacksmith-menubar-secondary-broadcast-height is also set. Requires reload to apply.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastFollowViewFill-Hint: Percent of the viewport the follow box should fill.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastCombatViewFill-Hint: Percent of the viewport the combatant box should fill.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastSpectatorPartyBoxFill-Hint: Percent of the viewport the framed box should fill for Party Spectator and Token Spectator modes.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastCombatBeginMode-Hint: Mode to switch to when the GM clicks Begin Combat. No change = do not auto-switch.
coffee-pub-herald.broadcastCombatEndMode-Hint: Mode to switch to when the GM clicks End Combat. No change = do not auto-switch.
coffee-pub-herald.notification-no-combat: No active combat. Start combat first.
coffee-pub-herald.context-tool-toggle-combat-bar-hint: Show/hide combat bar on cameraman (until you change the module setting)
coffee-pub-herald.view-mode-no-cameraman-hint: No broadcast user selected in module settings
coffee-pub-herald.view-mode-cameraman-offline-hint: The broadcast user is not logged in
